title: TNAU neem-cake + bleaching-powder drench for tomato bacterial wilt
body: Where Sri Lanka's HORDI recommendation offers no chemical control for bacterial wilt (Ralstonia solanacearum) on tomato, Tamil Nadu Agricultural University prescribes a soil-amendment pathway: apply neem cake at 100 kg/acre as a basal soil amendment, drench with bleaching powder (calcium hypochlorite) at 4 kg/acre at early wilt symptoms, and tighten irrigation to keep the rhizosphere from staying saturated. This is a promising IPM layer for Sri Lanka dry-zone farms — cheap, soil-compatible, and attacking the same pathogen — but the rates were calibrated on Tamil Nadu laterite soils and should be validated by a DOA agronomist on DL1/DL2 soils before being used on-farm. Pair with resistant / wilt-tolerant varieties and crop rotation per DOA guidance.

body_translated.en: Where Sri Lanka's HORDI recommendation offers no chemical control for bacterial wilt (Ralstonia solanacearum) on tomato, Tamil Nadu Agricultural University prescribes a soil-amendment pathway: apply neem cake at 100 kg/acre as a basal soil amendment, drench with bleaching powder (calcium hypochlorite) at 4 kg/acre at early wilt symptoms, and tighten irrigation to keep the rhizosphere from staying saturated. This is a promising IPM layer for Sri Lanka dry-zone farms — cheap, soil-compatible, and attacking the same pathogen — but the rates were calibrated on Tamil Nadu laterite soils and should be validated by a DOA agronomist on DL1/DL2 soils before being used on-farm. Pair with resistant / wilt-tolerant varieties and crop rotation per DOA guidance.
body_translated.si: තක්කාලි මත බැක්ටීරියා ගහනයට (Ralstonia solanacearum) ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ HORDI නිර්දේශය රසායනික පාලනයක් ඉදිරිපත් නොකරන අතර, තමිල් නාඩු කෘෂිකාර්මික විශ්වවිද්‍යාලය පස-සංශෝධන මාර්ගයක් නිර්දේශ කරයි: අක්කරයකට නීම් කැක් 100 kg මූලික පස සංශෝධකයක් ලෙස යොදන්න, මුල් ගහන රෝග ලකුණු පෙන්වීමේදී අක්කරයකට 4 kg බ්ලීචිං පවුඩර් (calcium hypochlorite) වත් කරන්න, සහ rhizosphere සංතෘප්ත ලෙස පවතීමෙන් වැළැක්වීමට වාරි මාර්ග සීමා කරන්න. මෙය ශ්‍රී ලාංකික වියළි කලාප ගොවිබිම් සඳහා පොරොන්දු දෙන IPM ස්ථරයකි — ලාභයි, පසට ගැලපේ, සහ එකම රෝගකාරකයට පහර දෙයි — නමුත් අනුපාත තමිල් නාඩු laterite පස මත ක්‍රමාංකනය කර ඇති බැවින් ගොවිබිමේ භාවිතා කිරීමට පෙර DL1/DL2 පස මත DOA කෘෂි විද්‍යාඥයෙකු විසින් වලංගු කළ යුතුය. ප්‍රතිරෝධී / ගහන-ඉවසන ප්‍රභේද සහ DOA මාර්ගෝපදේශය අනුව බෝග මාරුව සමඟ යුගල කරන්න.
body_translated.ta: தக்காளியில் பாக்டீரியா வாட்டத்திற்கு (Ralstonia solanacearum) இலங்கையின் HORDI பரிந்துரை எந்த இரசாயன கட்டுப்பாட்டையும் வழங்கவில்லை, தமிழ்நாடு வேளாண்மை பல்கலைக்கழகம் ஒரு மண்-திருத்த பாதையை பரிந்துரைக்கிறது: ஏக்கருக்கு 100 kg வேப்பம் பிண்ணாக்கை அடிப்படை மண் திருத்தமாக பயன்படுத்தவும், ஆரம்ப வாட்ட அறிகுறிகளில் ஏக்கருக்கு 4 kg வெளுப்புத் தூள் (calcium hypochlorite) ஊற்றவும், மற்றும் rhizosphere நிறைவாக இருப்பதைத் தடுக்க நீர்ப்பாசனத்தை இறுக்கவும். இது இலங்கை வறண்ட வலய பண்ணைகளுக்கான நம்பிக்கையான IPM அடுக்கு — மலிவானது, மண்-பொருந்தக்கூடியது, மற்றும் அதே நோய்க்காரணியை தாக்குகிறது — ஆனால் விகிதங்கள் தமிழ்நாடு laterite மண் மீது அளவுப்படுத்தப்பட்டவை மற்றும் வயலில் பயன்படுத்தப்படுவதற்கு முன்பு DL1/DL2 மண் மீது DOA விவசாய விஞ்ஞானியால் சரிபார்க்கப்பட வேண்டும். எதிர்ப்பு / வாட்டம்-தாங்கும் வகைகள் மற்றும் DOA வழிகாட்டுதலின்படி பயிர் சுழற்சி உடன் இணைக்கவும்.

quote: Cultural practices: crop rotation; Disease free seedlings; Restriction of irrigation. Soil application of neem cake @ 100 kg/acre. Drenching with bleaching powder @ 4 kg/ac.

field_provenance.caveat: Tamil Nadu recommendation. Rates must be validated by a DOA agronomist on Sri Lankan soils before being used for farmer-facing advice. Render with an analogy badge.
